subject: New Assignment: Backend Engineer
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: NordHealth
ROLE: Mid Backend Engineer
START: 2023-11-18
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Malmö / hybrid
RATE: 825 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, Azure, Docker Compose and PostgreSQL.

Key requirements:
• Java
• Azure
• Docker Compose
• PostgreSQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
